ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "commits" REAL /* Number of commits made to the project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the project */,
  "num_using" INTEGER /* Number of users utilizing this project */,
  "dev_status" TEXT /* Development status of the project (e.g., Alpha, Beta) */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars given to the project */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary maintainer of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog associated with this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the latest version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times this version has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., developer, maintainer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this commit was made to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Commit message describing the changes */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_url" TEXT /* URL to the commit in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this document belongs to */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this document is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the project */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., star, fork, watch) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the engagement was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the engagement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_engagement_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to this role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., contributor, maintainer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
